title: hyptis pyriformis
intro: Hyptis pyriformis, also known as Mexican peppermint, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hyptis pyriformis include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory problems, such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Hyptis pyriformis include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
